task:
A pre-seeded Zotero library is at /home/user/Zotero/zotero.sqlite. The 'BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers' item currently has the 'nlp' tag but not 'important'.

Perform both of the following tagging operations:
1. Create a new tag named exactly 'transformer-arch' (lowercase, with hyphen) and assign it to both 'Attention Is All You Need' and 'BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers'.
2. Assign the existing 'important' tag to the BERT item.

Leave Zotero running so the changes persist.

verification.command: check-item-tag 'Attention Is All You Need' transformer-arch
